name: Arousara Orb
descrip: Erotic magic that arouses your target.
outcome: [AttackerName] uses the Arousara Orb, making it dissolve into a large wave of erotic magic that washes over [TargetName], causing [TargetHimOrHer]'s body to shake in pleasure.
miss: [AttackerName] uses the Arousara Orb, making it dissolve into a large wave of erotic magic that washes over [TargetName], but it seems to have no effect on [TargetHimOrHer].
